description: Create a product categorization system for the store. Establish a 'Product Categories' taxonomy vocabulary (machine name: product_categories) including terms for Audio & Headphones, Computer Peripherals, Smart Home, and Cameras & Photography. Add an 'Entity Reference' field labeled 'Category' (machine name: field_category) to the 'Default' Product type (not the Product Variation type) referencing the 'Product Categories' vocabulary. Categorize the 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' as 'Audio & Headphones' and the 'Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse' as 'Computer Peripherals'.
